description: Sources Dealix Research & Targeting OS is allowed to use. Blocked sources are never processed. Mirrors the Tier-1 Source Registry (auto_client_acquisition.revenue_os.source_registry).
notes: open_data_portal covers public, processable government open data (CSV/JSON/XML) used as a supporting indicator only — never a substitute for per-company manual verification.
manual_linkedin_research is public-profile reading by a human only; LinkedIn automation is blocked.
search_api reads public result metadata (title/link/snippet); it does not fetch or scrape page bodies.
